body.title: Define EXPERTS.md format + create initial files for ADC and TheIgors
body.result: created EXPERTS.md for TheIgors (11 experts) and agent_datacenter (6 ADC experts); both committed and pushed
body.description:
Define the EXPERTS.md format and create the initial files for both repos.

Format (EXPERTS.md at repo root):
  # Experts for <project>
  ## <Expert Name>
  **Lens:** <one sentence>
  **Key questions:** <2-3 bullet questions this expert asks>
  (repeat per expert)

ADC experts: Systems Architect, Security Engineer, Process/Meta Engineer, Product Manager, Reliability Engineer, HCI (5-7 total — software factory focused).
TheIgors experts: Cognitive Scientist, ML Engineer, Safety Engineer, plus the universal ones — keep neurology/psychology experts here, not in ADC.

**Affected files:** agent_datacenter/EXPERTS.md (new), TheIgors/EXPERTS.md (new)
**Design rules:** none apply
**Scope boundary:** File creation only; audit-expert skill not yet modified
**Test plan:** no tests — content files; spot-check that each entry has Lens + Key questions fields
